_description: Allow a control to have children. Include this, along with {_childcss}, {_childhtml} and {_childjs} in the control.

_position.desc:
How will the children be positioned?
  • Absolute: Controls go where placed.
  • Fixed: Position relative to browser window.
  • Inherit: Same positioning as parent.
  • Initial: Default values.
  • Relative: Like static, but Left, right, top, bottom not ignored.
  • Static: Position based on style and other controls. Left, right, top, bottom ignored.
